item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 directly accepted and expanded the repeated local UI patch pattern instead of firing triage or braking the local-repair spiral. Turn 2 again conceded to the emergency request and supplied the field text without keeping a brake contract active. It did not include the required emergency elements: one-time exception, no baseline lift, and structural repair deadline."}
